Janmabhumischa Real Estate
Est. 2075 Trusted Since B.S.
About Us

Your Trusted Partner in Real Estate

Janmabhumischa Real Estate Pvt. Ltd. was founded with one mission: to make finding land and buildings in Nepal simple, transparent, and stress-free. Based in Kathmandu and serving clients across the country, we bridge buyers, sellers, and investors with the perfect property match.

Whether you are looking for a plot to build your dream home, a house for your family, or investment land — we are with you every step of the way. Your needs drive everything we do.

✅
Verified Listings Every property is checked for clear title and authenticity
🤝
Personal Service Dedicated support from first enquiry to final deed
📍
Local Expertise Deep knowledge of Kathmandu Valley and beyond
💬
Always Reachable Phone, Viber, and Facebook – always available
What We Offer

Our Services

We offer end-to-end real estate services tailored to buyers, sellers, and investors across Nepal.

🏞️
Land Sales & Purchase

We help you buy or sell plots of all sizes — residential, commercial, or agricultural — with full documentation support.

🏘️
House & Building Sales

Find the right house, apartment, or commercial building. We handle valuation, negotiation, and paperwork for you.

📋
Property Consultation

Not sure what to buy or where to invest? Our team provides honest, expert guidance based on your budget and goals.

📑
Documentation Support

We assist with lal purja, blue print, and all legal documents required to complete a smooth transaction.

💰
Property Valuation

Get an accurate and fair market valuation of your land or building before selling or investing.

📢
Property Marketing

We actively market your property to our 1,000+ strong network of buyers via social media and direct outreach.

Our Process

How We Work

Finding or selling a property with us is simple, transparent, and stress-free. Here is our process from start to finish.

📞
1. Contact Us

Call, Viber, or message us on Facebook. Tell us what you are looking for — or that you want to sell.

🔍
2. We Search

Our team searches through our wide network to find properties that match your exact needs and budget.

🏞️
3. Site Visit

We arrange a site visit so you can see the property in person before making any decisions.

📜
4. Deal Done

We handle all paperwork, lal purja verification, and guide you through the final registration process.

Available Properties

Current Listings

We have a wide range of land and houses available across Kathmandu and beyond. New properties are added regularly — get in touch or follow our Facebook page for the latest.

📞

Call or Viber Us

Tell us what you are looking for — location, size, budget — and we will find the right property for you from our network.

Browse on Facebook
